message:
feat(replay): simulation guardrails with fail-closed safety controls (ft-og6q6.4.4)

SimulationGuard (thread-local flag with leak detection), ResourceTracker
(event/wall-clock/memory limits), ConcurrencyGate (RAII token-based),
watchdog stall detection, and GuardrailReport. 24 unit + 17 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
